title: Chief Financial Officer
summary: The Chief Financial Officer keeps Neuroartan financially clear, disciplined, and ready to grow without losing control of its resources.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role protects the company’s financial discipline, runway, reporting, and capital decisions as ICOS moves toward market readiness.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Build the financial system that lets Neuroartan move with ambition, discipline, and clear awareness of its real resources.
